## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all --locked`
- [ ] `claude plugin validate .`

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] No credentials, raw transcripts, private source, or generated handoff artifacts are included.
- [ ] Protected-mode behavior is unchanged or covered by tests.
